notes: Step 3/6: Value generators and noise still has 1 error(s) after 3 refinements
fixes: Removed trailing whitespace stripping operator (-%}) from the import statement on line 1 of main.jinja2 to preserve the newline after the import, preventing the metadata docstring from being fused with subsequent Python code
Removed trailing dash operator from macro definition on line 2 of main.jinja2 to preserve whitespace inside the docstring
Removed leading dash operator from endmacro tag on line 19 of main.jinja2 to preserve the blank line in the docstring
Removed all trailing whitespace stripping operators (-%}) from conditional endif tags inside the render_metadata_docstring macro (lines 9, 12, 15 of main.jinja2)
Removed leading whitespace stripping operator from the import statement on line 1 of main.jinja2 to preserve proper spacing
Removed trailing whitespace stripping operator from endmacro tag on line 19 of main.jinja2
Changed all conditional blocks in the docstring macro to use plain {% %} tags without dashes to preserve natural whitespace structure
Fixed Jinja2 syntax error in helpers.jinja2 line 17: Changed double curly braces '{{' to single curly brace with space '{ ' to properly render Python dict literal instead of Jinja2 expression tag
Fixed Jinja2 syntax error in helpers.jinja2 line 37: Changed double curly braces '{{' to single curly brace with space '{ ' for Dict rendering in render_list_item macro
Fixed Jinja2 syntax error in helpers.jinja2 line 57: Changed double curly braces '{{' to single curly brace with space '{ ' for Dict rendering in render_dict_value macro
Fixed render_condition_class macro to avoid empty ConditionExpression() calls by checking if operators exist before wrapping in ConditionExpression

Fixed render_condition_term macro to output a valid placeholder condition (NumericCondition comparing 1 == 1) when ConditionTerm has no nested condition, preventing syntax errors from incomplete condition data
Added deduplication logic for authentication classes using auth_seen set, mirroring the pattern used for generators and noise classes
Changed authentication class rendering loop to check classname(broker
